query:
UPDATE waCountyParcels SET propertyType = CASE 
  WHEN parcelId = '12345-001' THEN 'residential'
  WHEN parcelId = '12345-002' THEN 'commercial'
  WHEN parcelId = '12345-003' THEN 'residential'
  WHEN parcelId = '12345-004' THEN 'industrial'
  WHEN parcelId = '12345-005' THEN 'agricultural'
END
WHERE parcelId IN ('12345-001', '12345-002', '12345-003', '12345-004', '12345-005');
